audit_policies.description: CGST + SGST should equal 5% of Sub_Total for local food orders (tolerance ±1).
audit_policies.action: Recalculate GST and update records. Flag as 'Incorrect GST Calculation'.

audit_policies.policy_name: Invalid Service Charge for Online Order
audit_policies.description: Online orders (Zomato/Swiggy) must not have service charges.
audit_policies.action: Remove service charge from online order. Flag as 'Invalid Service Charge for Online Order'.

audit_policies.description: Items marked Non_Taxable should have zero tax amounts.
audit_policies.action: Remove tax amounts from non-taxable item. Flag as 'Tax Applied to Non-Taxable Item'.

audit_policies.policy_name: Invalid Payment Method for Online Order
audit_policies.description: Online orders must use Online, Zomato Pay, or Paytm payment methods.
audit_policies.action: Verify payment method for online order. Flag as 'Invalid Payment Method for Online Order'.

audit_policies.description: Local orders should not have aggregator order numbers (Zomato/Swiggy).
audit_policies.action: Clear aggregator fields or reclassify order. Flag as 'Local Order with Aggregator Data'.

audit_policies.description: Cancelled orders with food preparation time exceeding 30 minutes.
audit_policies.action: Review cancellation reason and process. Flag as 'Late Cancellation'.

audit_policies.description: Cancelled orders with total value exceeding ₹1000.
audit_policies.action: Investigate cancellation cause. Flag as 'High-Value Cancellation'.

audit_policies.description: Complimentary orders must have an assigned approver.
audit_policies.action: Assign approver or verify policy. Flag as 'Unapproved Complimentary Order'.

audit_policies.description: Service charge was manually removed after billing (modify_comment contains 'sc' or 'removed sc').
audit_policies.action: Review whether service charge removal was authorized. Flag as 'Post-Bill Modification: SC Removed'.

audit_policies.description: Dine-in orders should not use aggregator payment methods (Zomato Pay, Paytm) unless Is_Online.
audit_policies.action: Verify if this is a legitimate in-restaurant aggregator payment. Flag as 'Aggregator Payment on Dine-In'.

audit_policies.description: The Date field and Timestamp field refer to different calendar days.
audit_policies.action: Verify correct transaction date. Flag as 'Date/Timestamp Mismatch'.

audit_policies.description: When a discount is applied, Tax should be recalculated on (Sub_Total - Discount). Checks if Tax > 10% of (Sub_Total - Discount) with tolerance ±2.
audit_policies.action: Recalculate tax after applying discount. Flag as 'Tax Not Adjusted for Discount'.

audit_policies.description: For Zomato/Swiggy orders, local Tax should be 0 since tax is handled by the aggregator (Online_Tax_Calculated_z/s > 0).
audit_policies.action: Remove local tax from aggregator order to prevent double taxation. Flag as 'Online Order Tax Double-Count'.

audit_policies.description: Items with Price=0 (e.g., complementary water) should not have any tax amounts.
audit_policies.action: Remove tax from zero-price item. Flag as 'Tax on Zero-Price Item'.
